expectations.text: Contains all 7 template sections: Overview, Running locally, CI, Writing new tests, Coverage, Known Gaps, Appendix
expectations.evidence: Sections 1. Overview, 2. Running locally, 3. CI, 4. Writing new tests, 5. Coverage, 6. Known Gaps, 7. Appendix all present as headings.

expectations.text: Has a tier table distinguishing Unit / Integration / E2E with locations
expectations.evidence: Tiers table at lines 11-15 lists Unit (test/unit/), Integration (test/integration/), E2E (test/e2e/).

expectations.text: Has a 3rd-party mocks table listing Stripe and Twilio
expectations.evidence: 3rd-party mocks table at lines 19-22 lists Stripe and Twilio rows.

expectations.text: Documents CI workflows (test.yml + e2e.yml) with trigger and filter
expectations.evidence: CI table at lines 63-66 shows test.yml (push, tests except E2E) and e2e.yml (pull_request, E2E only).

expectations.text: Includes an orphan-check statement for CI coverage
expectations.evidence: Line 68: '**Orphan check**: every test folder in the repo is run by at least one workflow... No silent drops.'

expectations.text: Known Gaps section is present and explicitly empty (no placeholder text lies)
expectations.evidence: Section 6 at lines 119-125 states '(No gaps yet — freshly scaffolded.)' — explicitly empty.

expectations.text: Appendix contains concrete filter expressions for each workflow
expectations.evidence: Appendix lines 131-134 contain concrete filter expressions: 'jest --testPathIgnorePatterns=test/e2e' and 'playwright test test/e2e'.
